# Create New Assignment Skill

This skill automates the process of creating new assignments for the educational portal. It guides you through setting up a properly structured assignment following project standards and templates.

## Purpose

Create a new assignment with:
- Properly formatted README.md following the assignment template
- Starter code file
- Optional data files (for data analysis assignments)
- Automatic config.json updates

## When to Use

- Creating a new homework assignment
- Setting up a coding exercise for students
- Adding content to the assignments folder

## Workflow

1. Use the assignment guide to understand the structure
2. Run update-config.js to add assignment metadata
3. Run add-attachment.js to include starter files
4. Verify assignment appears in the portal

## References

See [assignment-guide.md](references/assignment-guide.md) for detailed instructions on assignment structure and best practices.
